message:
beads: add release-readiness gate and validation manifest tasks

Added new issues for quality evidence aggregation:
- bd-mblr.3.5: Unified quality evidence rollup gate aggregating
  coverage/no-mock/unit/e2e/logging gates into release-readiness decision
- bd-mblr.3.5.1: Machine-readable validation manifest recording gate
  outcomes, invariant drift, scenario coverage, logging conformance
- bd-mblr.3.5.2: Operator-facing release readiness report with failure
  drill-down and direct artifact links

All tasks properly linked with blockedBy dependencies to prerequisite
CI gates (3.1.2, 3.2.2, 3.3, 3.4.1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
